sources.title: Reducing Dead Zones in a Home Wi-Fi Setup
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on diagnosing and reducing Wi-Fi dead zones in a home without replacing every device.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to diagnose and reduce dead zones in a home Wi-Fi setup without immediately replacing every piece of equipment.

sources.title: Routine Care for a Cast-Iron Skillet
sources.description: Assistant-style explanation of how to clean, dry, season, and store a cast-iron skillet.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks for a practical routine for cleaning, drying, seasoning, and storing a cast-iron skillet without damaging it.

sources.title: Keeping Potted Kitchen Herbs Alive Indoors
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on light, watering, drainage, and pruning for indoor herb pots.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to keep common kitchen herbs like basil, mint, and parsley alive indoors over several months.

sources.title: Choosing a Rain Jacket and Layering System
sources.description: Assistant-style comparison of shell types, breathability, insulation layering, and use cases.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to choose a rain jacket and layering system for everyday city use plus occasional day hikes.

sources.title: A Reliable Backup Strategy for Family Photos
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on organizing, backing up, and verifying personal photo collections.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks for a practical backup strategy for family photos and videos that balances convenience, cost, and redundancy.

sources.title: Understanding Bike Tire Pressure for Everyday Riding
sources.description: Assistant-style explanation of tire pressure tradeoffs for comfort, rolling resistance, and puncture risk.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to choose sensible bike tire pressure for commuting and weekend riding without overthinking every ride.

sources.title: Picking a Desk Lamp for Reading and Screen Work
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on brightness, color temperature, glare, and placement for desk lighting.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to choose and position a desk lamp for reading, writing, and computer work without eye strain.

sources.title: Building a Practical Car Emergency Kit
sources.description: Assistant-style checklist and explanation for a useful, realistic car emergency kit.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to keep in a car emergency kit for normal road travel, including seasonal adjustments and maintenance.

sources.title: Choosing Meal-Prep Containers That Actually Work
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on container materials, sizes, leakage, reheating, and storage tradeoffs.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to choose meal-prep containers that stack well, do not leak easily, and survive repeated washing and reheating.

sources.title: When a Home Router Upgrade Is Worth It
sources.description: Assistant-style explanation of when router upgrades help and when placement or configuration matters more.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to tell whether a slow or unreliable home network actually needs a new router or just better placement and settings.

sources.title: Doing Laundry Efficiently During Travel
sources.description: Assistant-style practical advice on hand-washing, drying, packing, and minimizing laundry hassle during travel.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to manage laundry efficiently during a two-week trip with light packing and limited access to washers and dryers.

sources.title: Beginner Composting Without a Backyard
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on simple composting approaches for apartments or small spaces.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to start composting in a small space or apartment without creating odor, pests, or an overcomplicated routine.

sources.title: What to Keep or Toss After a Refrigerator Power Outage
sources.description: Assistant-style triage for deciding what food is still safe after a multi-hour refrigerator and freezer outage.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to decide what food to keep or throw away after a power outage left the refrigerator and freezer off for several hours, and they do not want either needless waste or a bad guess.

sources.title: Preparing an Apartment for Move-Out and Deposit Return
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on move-out cleaning, documentation, patching, and avoiding avoidable security-deposit disputes.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to prepare a rental apartment for move-out so they can minimize deposit deductions without wasting time or money on unnecessary work.

sources.title: Handling Recurring Bathroom Mildew Before It Gets Worse
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on cleaning recurring mildew, reducing moisture, and knowing when to escalate a bathroom moisture problem.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do about mildew that keeps returning around a bathroom ceiling and grout, and they want practical next steps before it becomes a bigger problem.

sources.title: What to Do When Checked Luggage Does Not Arrive
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on reporting delayed baggage, keeping receipts, buying essentials, and following up effectively with an airline.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after landing and discovering that their checked bag did not arrive, including what to buy immediately and how to improve the odds of a smooth claim.

sources.title: Checking a Used Laptop Before Buying It
sources.description: Assistant-style checklist for inspecting a used laptop, testing key components, and deciding when a deal is too risky.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to inspect a used laptop before buying it from a local seller so they can catch common problems without turning the meetup into a full technical teardown.

sources.title: Getting Rid of Pantry Moths Without Replacing Everything
sources.description: Assistant-style practical cleanup plan for pantry moths, food triage, storage changes, and follow-up prevention.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to deal with pantry moths in a kitchen cabinet without turning the problem into a huge expensive reset of the whole pantry.

sources.title: A Check-Engine Light Right Before a Weekend Trip
sources.description: Assistant-style triage for a new check-engine light, including immediate checks, when driving may be reasonable, and when to stop.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after a check-engine light appears the day before a weekend drive, and they want to distinguish between sensible caution and unnecessary panic.

sources.title: Responding to a New Ceiling Water Stain
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on documenting a new ceiling water stain, reducing near-term damage, and escalating to maintenance or a landlord.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after noticing a new water stain spreading across an apartment ceiling after heavy rain, including what to document and what not to ignore.

sources.title: A Clicking External Drive With Important Files On It
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on reducing further damage, prioritizing backups, and deciding when not to keep trying DIY fixes on a failing external drive.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after an external drive with important personal files starts making clicking noises and behaving unpredictably, and they want the safest practical next steps.

sources.title: Handling a Damaged Appliance Delivery and Return
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on documenting shipping damage, contacting the seller, handling installation timing, and pushing for a practical resolution.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after a delivered appliance arrives visibly damaged, including what to document immediately and how to push for a replacement or refund without a drawn-out mess.

sources.title: A Smoke Detector That Keeps Chirping at Home
sources.description: Assistant-style triage for a smoke detector that keeps chirping, including battery issues, replacement timing, and when the problem may be more than a simple low-battery alert.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do about a smoke detector that keeps chirping even after a battery change, and they want to solve it safely without overreacting or ignoring something important.

sources.title: A Package Marked Delivered That Never Showed Up
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on checking likely delivery points, gathering evidence, contacting the seller or carrier, and deciding when to escalate a missing-package claim.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after a package is marked delivered but is not in the mailbox, lobby, porch, or usual safe-drop spots, and they want the most effective next steps without wasting a day.

sources.title: A Water Heater With a New Leak or Puddle
sources.description: Assistant-style triage for a leaking water heater, including immediate safety steps, damage control, and how to distinguish urgent failure from a smaller issue.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after noticing water near a home water heater, and they want to understand what to shut off, what to document, and when waiting is a bad idea.

sources.title: A Tire With Sidewall Damage Before an Important Drive
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on inspecting sidewall damage, judging whether driving is reasonable, and knowing when replacement should take priority.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after spotting a cut, bulge, or scuff on a tire sidewall shortly before a planned drive, and they want practical guidance instead of vague blanket warnings.

sources.title: Getting Out of a Subscription Cancellation Loop
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on documenting cancellation attempts, avoiding duplicate charges, and escalating cleanly when a service makes cancellation unusually difficult.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do when a subscription service keeps routing them in circles during cancellation and they want to stop the next charge without making the situation messier.

sources.title: Backing Up a Phone With a Failing Screen
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on stabilizing access, backing up data, and planning device replacement when a phone screen is failing or intermittently unusable.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to back up and migrate a phone after the screen starts going black or registering touches unreliably, and they want to avoid making the situation worse.

sources.title: A Wasp Nest Near a Front Door or Walkway
sources.description: Assistant-style practical advice on reducing risk, deciding between DIY and professional removal, and avoiding common mistakes around wasp nests near daily-use areas.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after discovering a wasp nest near a front door or walkway, and they want a practical plan that balances safety, cost, and urgency.

sources.title: Temporarily Securing a Broken Window
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on safely securing a broken window, preventing further damage, and preparing for proper repair or landlord follow-up.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to handle a cracked or broken window before a proper repair can happen, including what to clean up, how to secure it, and what to document.

sources.title: Following Up on an Obvious Duplicate Charge
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on documenting duplicate card charges, contacting the merchant first, and deciding when it makes sense to escalate to the card issuer.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after seeing an obvious duplicate charge from a recent purchase, and they want to resolve it efficiently without triggering avoidable complications.

sources.title: Handling Minor Damage Before Returning a Rental Car
sources.description: Assistant-style advice on documenting damage, understanding likely charges, and communicating clearly with a rental desk before surprises compound.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after noticing a scrape or small dent on a rental car before return, and they want to handle it in a way that is honest but not needlessly chaotic.

sources.title: A Boarding Pass Name That Does Not Match Exactly
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on assessing how serious a flight-booking name mismatch is, what to fix in advance, and how to avoid airport-day surprises.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after noticing that the name on a boarding pass or booking confirmation does not exactly match their ID, and they want the safest practical next steps.

sources.title: A Washing Machine That Starts Leaking Mid-Cycle
sources.description: Assistant-style triage for a leaking washing machine, including immediate containment, likely causes, and what to inspect before running another load.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks what to do after finding water on the floor during or after a washing-machine cycle, and they want to limit damage while figuring out whether the issue is simple or serious.

sources.title: Sharing Documents While Redacting Sensitive Information
sources.description: Assistant-style guidance on what to redact, how to avoid fake redactions, and how to share documents safely with landlords, insurers, or service providers.
sources.topic_prompt: A user asks how to share photos or scanned documents with a company or service provider while hiding unnecessary personal details, and they want a method that is actually safe.
